Given the initial vertex positions and velocities, as well as object material type, rigid or elastic, the model samples future vertex trajectories. While related n
articles.summary: PhysiFormer是一种扩散Transformer，用于物理合理的3D物体运动模拟。将对象表示为世界坐标下的3D网格，输入初始顶点位置、速度及材质类型（刚体/弹性），采样未来顶点轨迹。克服了像素空间视点依赖问题，在物理模拟领域有应用潜力。

articles.title: Hallucination in World Models is Predictable and Preventable
articles.excerpt: Modern generative world models render increasingly realistic action-controllable futures, yet they frequently hallucinate: rollouts remain visually fluent while drifting from the ground-truth dynamics. We hypothesize that hallucination concentrates in low-coverage regions of the state-action space, where lightweight data-centric signals can both detect it and guide mitigation. To test this, we int
articles.summary: 发现世界模型中的幻觉集中在状态-动作空间的低覆盖区域，提出轻量级数据驱动信号可检测并减轻幻觉。通过分析覆盖区域，在保持视觉流畅性的同时提升动态真实性，为世界模型的可信部署提供保障。

articles.title: EO-WM: A Physically Informed World Model for Probabilistic Earth Observation Forecasting
articles.excerpt: Earth Observation (EO) forecasting aims to predict future Earth surface dynamics from satellite observations under changing meteorological conditions. In this paper, we view this task as a partially observed, weather-driven world modeling problem, in which weather acts as a conditioning signal, while forecasting remains uncertain due to sparse observations and unobserved land-surface states. Howev
articles.summary: EO-WM将地球观测预测视为部分观测、天气驱动的世界建模问题，结合物理信息与概率建模，在稀疏观测下预测地表动态。该方法有助于农业、灾害监测等领域的卫星数据应用，提升预测鲁棒性。

articles.title: Qwen-Image-Agent: Bridging the Context Gap in Real-World Image Generation
articles.excerpt: While text-to-image (T2I) models have achieved remarkable progress, they struggle with real-world requests that are often underspecified, implicit, or dependent on up-to-date knowledge. We identify this challenge as the Context Gap: the mismatch between the user context and the sufficient generation context for T2I models. To bridge this gap, we propose Qwen-Image-Agent, a unified agentic framewor
articles.summary: Qwen-Image-Agent提出统一智能体框架，通过检索和推理补充用户上下文，弥合用户意图与T2I模型所需充分语境之间的差距。提升图像生成对复杂实际请求的匹配度，解决上下文缺失问题。

articles.title: Confidence-Aware Tool Orchestration for Robust Video Understanding
articles.excerpt: Video reasoning language models implicitly assume that every input frame is equally reliable. This leads to what we term the Blind Trust Problem: under realistic perturbations such as motion blur, glare, or occlusion, frontier video reasoning models can suffer 15-30%p accuracy drops on real-world embodied benchmarks, while remaining unaware that their visual evidence has been degraded. To address
articles.summary: 视频推理模型在模糊、遮挡等扰动下精度下降15-30%，提出置信度感知工具编排方法，动态评估每帧质量并选择合适工具，显著提升鲁棒性。在具身基准测试上验证有效性，减少盲信问题。

articles.title: OPID: On-Policy Skill Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Outcome-based reinforcement learning provides a stable optimization backbone for language agents, but its sparse trajectory-level rewards provide little guidance on which intermediate decisions should be reinforced or suppressed. On-policy self-distillation offers dense token-level supervision, yet existing skill-conditioned variants often rely on external skill memories or retrieved privileged co
articles.summary: OPID提出在策略技能蒸馏，利用在线自蒸馏提供密集token级监督，无需外部技能记忆。提升语言智能体在长程任务中的中间决策质量，解决基于结果的RL中稀疏奖励引导不足的问题。

articles.title: In-Context World Modeling for Robotic Control
articles.excerpt: Modern Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models often fail to generalize to novel setups, such as altered camera viewpoints or robot morphologies, because they are typically conditioned only on current observations and language instructions. By ignoring the underlying system configuration as a variable, these models implicitly assume a fixed execution context encountered during training, necessitating
articles.summary: 现代VLA模型因仅依赖当前观测和指令，难以泛化至新视角或机器人形态。提出上下文世界建模，将系统配置视为变量，通过上下文推理适应变化，增强机器人控制对未知环境的适应性。

articles.title: Running the Gauntlet: Re-evaluating the Capabilities of Agents Beyond Familiar Environments
articles.excerpt: As agentic systems continue to evolve and are widely deployed in real-world scenarios, there is a growing demand to faithfully evaluate their capabilities. articles.summary: 现有智能体基准任务简单、能力维度窄，导致性能饱和。提出Gauntlet评估套件，涵盖多样化复杂场景和多维度能力，重新评估智能体在陌生环境中的真实能力，揭示泛化和鲁棒性不足。

articles.title: Neural Voxel Dynamics: Learning Implicit 3D Physics via Volumetric Feature Advection
articles.excerpt: We present a self-supervised framework for learning implicit 3D physical dynamics directly from video-derived supervisory signals. While current generative video models achieve high visual fidelity, they lack a 3D geometric foundation, often resulting in physical inconsistencies and a failure to maintain object permanence. We address this by shifting the predictive bottleneck from 2D image space t
articles.summary: 自监督框架Neural Voxel Dynamics从视频信号学习隐式3D物理动力学，将预测瓶颈转移到体素特征平流，保持物体恒存性和物理一致性。无需显式物理模拟，在物理推理和视频预测中表现良好。

articles.title: COrigami: An AI Pipeline for Co-Designing Flat-Foldable Visually Recognisable Origami
articles.excerpt: While generative AI has achieved remarkable success in solving problems with verifiable solutions, generating physical art that satisfies both strict geometric constraints and subjective visual aesthetics remains a challenge. This paper presents an approach to tackle these difficulties in the domain of computational origami, a mathematically rigid environment that grounds artistic design within th
articles.summary: COrigami结合计算几何与生成AI，实现可折叠且视觉可识别的折纸协同设计。在严格数学环境下平衡可解性与美学，推动AI辅助实体艺术创作，解决几何与美学双重约束问题。

articles.title: Fast LeWorldModel
articles.excerpt: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs), including recent LeWorldModel (LeWM), have become a promising foundation for reconstruction-free visual world models. For visual planning, however, LeWM evaluates candidate action sequences by repeatedly applying a local one-step latent transition model. This autoregressive rollout makes planning computationally expensive and exposes the predicted
articles.summary: Fast LeWorldModel改进联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA）中自回归规划的计算效率，加速潜在动作序列评估，降低推理成本。保留重建自由的优点，适合实时视觉规划任务。

articles.title: Neglected Free Lunch from Post-training: Progress Advantage for LLM Agents
articles.excerpt: Process reward models enable fine-grained, step-level evaluation of LLMs, yet building them for agentic settings remains prohibitively difficult: long-horizon interactions, irreversible actions, and stochastic environment feedback make both human annotation and Monte Carlo estimation infeasible at scale. In this work, we show that reinforcement learning (RL) post-training already provides the ingr
articles.summary: 发现RL后训练本身即提供过程监督信号（优势函数），无需额外标注。利用进步优势作为免费的过程监督，有效提升LLM智能体的步骤级评估，降低构建过程奖励模型的难度。

articles.title: Why Multi-Step Tool-Use Reinforcement Learning Collapses and How Supervisory Signals Fix It
articles.excerpt: Tool use enables large language models (LLMs) to perform complex tasks, and recent agentic reinforcement learning (RL) methods show promise for enhancing model capabilities. However, RL alone often leads to instability or limited gains in tool-use tasks. In our experiments, some models exhibit catastrophic collapse, where performance abruptly drops and tool-invocation structures fail. The analysis
articles.summary: 工具使用RL易出现性能骤降和工具调用结构失败，分析原因为稀疏奖励与探索不足。提出引入过程奖励或演示等监督信号可稳定训练，防止坍塌，为LLM工具使用智能体RL训练提供改进方案。
